ref: These are what make you unclean. Eating without washing your hands will not make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Mark
text: Yɛlibeeri anŋɔ taabu zaa n kyɛ ka ninsaala leebi da'ari daana, amaa nira yi bu peaai u nuusi ka di bundirigu, lala ku toaai n‑kyɛ ka u leebi da'ari daana.”
translated: We are all sitting on the same mat, but if someone does not take care of their portion and it gets torn, it will not be possible to repair it and make them a human being again.

ref: I was hungry, but you did not give me anything to eat, and I was thirsty, but you did not give me anything to drink.
text: Dama kɔm ŋɔn daa mari ma sahanseaa la, ya daa bu zaŋŋi diibu n‑diisi ma; kɔnyuuri gba ŋɔn daa mari ma, ya daa bu zaŋŋi koom n‑ti ma ni n nyu:
translated: When I was hungry, you did not give me anything to eat; when I was thirsty, you did not give me anything to drink:

ref: And when they found him, they said, “Everyone is looking for you!”
text: nti nya u, n‑yɛli u, ni, “Ba zaasa boori la i ziiya.”
translated: And then he said to him, "All the people are looking for you."

ref: He shouted, “Jesus, Son of God in heaven, what do you want with me? Promise me in God's name that you won't torture me!”
text: ka daa zɔ na n‑tuusi u soori nti gbaanni u tooni ka tasi n‑yɛli kpeeŋŋa, ni, “I ya niŋi ma la wula, Yisa nyin Naawunni Ŋɔn Ka Kpeaa biiya? Poom noori n‑ti ma, ni, i ku namsi ma!”
translated: He ran and met him on the road and stopped him and said with a loud voice, "What have you done to me, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? I beg you, do not torment me!"

ref: Everyone was completely surprised and kept saying to each other, “What is this? It must be some new kind of powerful teaching! Even the evil spirits obey him.”
text: Ka di daa gyɛri ba zaasa, ka ba yi yɛtti taaba, “Bɔ nŋɔa? Wulisigu paalli nŋɔa! U tɔ'asiri la ni yiiko, halli u yɛtti arizimbeeri gba ka ba sakkri u noori.”
translated: They were all gathered there, and they were saying to each other, "What is that? A whirlwind has come! It is shaking the ground with force, even the trees are shaking and their leaves are falling."
